name: kazakhpunk-slope-check
description: slope-check: audit AI papers, repos, and product pages against their quantitative claims

plugins.name: slope-check
plugins.description: Audit AI papers, repos, and product pages against their quantitative claims. Produces a structured slope report with reproducibility confidence scores, verdict per claim (VERIFIED/PARTIAL/WEAK/REFUTED/UNVERIFIABLE), and charts. 'Slope' is the gap between what is promised and what is real.
